questions.question: Describe the primary difference between IT security and OT security in the context of the Internet of Things. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Outlining the main distinction between IT and OT security principles

questions.question: What is the main challenge in securing IoT devices that are connected to the internet, and how can it be addressed? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Analyzing the risks and proposing mitigation strategies

questions.question: List three common security vulnerabilities that affect IoT devices, and explain how they can be exploited. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Identifying and explaining security vulnerabilities with examples
